title: Paragon Connected User
description: A Connected User represents an end-user of your application who has authenticated and connected third-party integrations through Paragon.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Connected User.

meta.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata associated with the Connected User.

authenticated.description: Whether the user is currently authenticated with Paragon.

integrations.description: A map of integration types to their status for this user.

UserIntegration.description: The status of a specific integration for a Connected User.

enabled.description: Whether the integration is enabled for this user.

credentialStatus.description: The status of the integration credential.
